summary: Parallel review: FAIL (3 critical, 9 warning, 7 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/report.mjs:131` тАФ Error messages written to `_stdout.write`, not stderr; inconsistent with the rest of the codebase (`gate.mjs:21`, `transition.mjs:24`, `harness-init.mjs:17`) which uses `console.error`. Breaks Unix pipe idiom тАФ `agt report my-feature | grep task-1` would include error text in pipe output. Fix requires adding a `stderr` injection point to `deps`.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/report.mjs:146` тАФ Error message says `"STATE.json not found"` even when the file exists but is corrupt JSON. `readState()` in `util.mjs:195тАУ197` silently swallows parse errors and returns `null` in both cases. A user with corrupt STATE.json will look for a missing file instead of diagnosing a parse failure. Update message to `"STATE.json missing or unreadable"` or distinguish the two code paths.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/report.mjs:117` тАФ Arg parser picks the first non-flag token as feature name; `agt report --output md my-feature` silently treats `"md"` as the feature name. Fix: strip the `--output <value>` pair from args before calling `.find()` for the positional.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/report.mjs:31` тАФ Status label is a binary choice: `"completed"` or `"Run in progress"`. A feature with `status: "failed"` or `"blocked"` in STATE.json shows "Run in progress" тАФ factually wrong. Fix: add label branches for other terminal states.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/report.mjs:117` тАФ `args.find(a => !a.startsWith("-"))` silently treats `"md"` as the feature name when user runs `agt report --output md my-feature`; add a test covering this arg ordering.
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/report.mjs:144` тАФ `readState` swallows JSON parse errors; `cmdReport` emits "STATE.json not found" even when the file exists but is corrupt тАФ add a test for malformed STATE.json.
ЁЯЯб `test/report.test.mjs` тАФ No test covers `tokenUsage.byPhase` with real cost data; the `perPhase` rendering path (`report.mjs:58-60`) is entirely untested.
ЁЯЯб Gate output provided to reviewer is truncated тАФ `report.test.mjs` results not visible; builder's claim of "539 tests pass" cannot be independently confirmed from supplied evidence.

**Summary:** The core implementation is solid тАФ all five required sections are generated, error exits work correctly, and `--output md` behaves as specified. The four warnings belong in backlog. No blocking issues from a test-coverage perspective (the Simplicity reviewer has a separate ЁЯФ┤ FAIL on the `--output md` interface design).

ЁЯЯб bin/lib/report.mjs:136 тАФ `featureName` from CLI args is passed unsanitized to `path.join()`; `--output md` can write `REPORT.md` to an arbitrary directory via path traversal (e.g. `agt report ../../tmp --output md`). Validate `featureName` matches `/^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$/` before constructing the path.

ЁЯФ┤ `bin/lib/report.mjs:118-119` тАФ Gold-plating: `--output` is parsed as a value argument but only `"md"` is ever checked. `--output json` or any other value silently falls through to stdout with no error тАФ a misleading multi-value interface for a single-value use case. Speculative extensibility with no stated requirement. Fix: replace with a boolean flag.
